query:
INSERT INTO social_media_posts (platform, post_type, content, media_url, hashtags, scheduled_at, status, campaign, qumus_managed, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
('twitter', 'video', '🎬 The RRB Ecosystem — A Legacy Restored

What if one family''s legacy could change the world?

54 channels. QUMUS AI orchestration. HybridCast emergency broadcasting. Sweet Miracles advocacy against elder abuse.

From Selma to the United Nations. This is more than a platform — this is a movement.

🔗 https://manuweb.sbs/ecosystem

#RRB #SQUADD #CSW70 #54Channels #CanrynProduction #QUMUS #SweetMiracles #HybridCast #ElderAbuse #UnitedNations', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663286151344/hpJXnZlwAEvMMHmi.mp4', '#RRB #SQUADD #CSW70 #54Channels #CanrynProduction #QUMUS #SweetMiracles #HybridCast', UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000, 'scheduled', 'ecosystem-presentation', 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000),

('discord', 'video', '🎬 **The RRB Ecosystem — A Legacy Restored**

What if one family''s legacy could change the world?

🎵 **54 Radio Channels** broadcasting 24/7
🤖 **QUMUS AI** — 90% autonomous orchestration
📡 **HybridCast** — Emergency broadcast system
💜 **Sweet Miracles** — Advocacy against elder abuse, neglect & exploitation
👑 **SQUADD Coalition** — Sisters Questing Unapologetically After Divine Destiny

From Selma to the United Nations. This is more than a platform — this is a movement.

🔗 **Watch the full presentation:** https://manuweb.sbs/ecosystem
📺 **60-second highlight:** https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663286151344/hpJXnZlwAEvMMHmi.mp4
📱 **Vertical cut (Stories/Reels):** https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663286151344/BUxkLtbiEBvBJoZn.mp4

#RRB #SQUADD #CSW70 #CanrynProduction #QUMUS', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663286151344/HPWKWjcKyPinNDUP.mp4', '#RRB #SQUADD #CSW70 #CanrynProduction #QUMUS', UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000, 'scheduled', 'ecosystem-presentation', 1, UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000);
